summary: Complete frontend testing of TrendScout website rebuild - all 15 pages tested. Homepage, Pricing, How It Works, About, Contact, UK Product Research, For Shopify, For Amazon UK, For TikTok Shop UK, 3 comparison pages, Free Tools page all render correctly. Interactive elements (billing toggle, FAQ accordions, calculator tabs, navigation dropdowns, mobile menu) all functional. All data-testid attributes present on key elements.

issues: 403 error on Pexels API (non-blocking, images still load)

passed_tests: Homepage (/) - hero section with UK messaging, trust bar with stats, 'Why different' feature cards, How It Works steps, trending products section, UK-specific section, use cases section, methodology section, final CTA

Pricing page (/pricing) - monthly/annual toggle works correctly, 3 tiers (Starter £19/£15, Growth £39/£31, Pro £79/£63), 'Most popular' badge on Growth, 13-row feature comparison table, 6 FAQ accordions working
How It Works page (/how-it-works) - 4-step process, 7-signal scoring model, score interpretation tiers, who it's for/not for sections, UK viability section
About page (/about) - company details (TrendScout Ltd, United Kingdom), story, values, CTA
Contact page (/contact) - email (info@trendscout.click), help centre link, company details, response times
UK Product Research page (/uk-product-research) - unique UK-focused copy, features, steps, UK points, FAQ, CTA
For Shopify page (/for-shopify) - Shopify-focused copy including 'Push to Shopify' feature
For Amazon UK page (/for-amazon-uk) - Amazon UK-focused copy including FBA references
For TikTok Shop UK page (/for-tiktok-shop-uk) - TikTok-focused copy including viral product references
Comparison: Jungle Scout vs TrendScout (/compare/jungle-scout-vs-trendscout) - feature comparison table, verdict section, best-for sections
Comparison: Sell The Trend vs TrendScout (/compare/sell-the-trend-vs-trendscout) - different content from Jungle Scout page
Comparison: Minea vs TrendScout (/compare/minea-vs-trendscout) - ad spy focused content, different from other comparisons
Free Tools page (/free-tools) - 4 calculators (Profit Margin, ROAS, VAT, Pricing), tab switching works, calculator inputs functional
Navigation - Product dropdown (Trending, Leaderboard, Free Tools), Solutions dropdown (Shopify, Amazon, TikTok, UK Research), active state highlighting on current page
Mobile menu - toggle button works, all navigation links displayed, proper grouping of Product and Solutions
Footer - 5-column layout (Product, Solutions, Compare, Company), UK company details (TrendScout Ltd, United Kingdom), comparison links, legal links
critical_code_review_comments: All pages have proper data-testid attributes for key interactive elements
Pricing toggle correctly updates prices across cards and comparison table
SeoLandingTemplate component properly reused across UK Product Research, For Shopify, For Amazon UK, For TikTok Shop UK pages
ComparisonPage component handles 3 different comparison slugs with unique content per competitor
Free Tools page calculators have proper inputs with correct UK-specific calculations (20% VAT)
LandingLayout provides consistent navigation and footer across all public pages
context_for_next_testing_agent: Complete website rebuild tested successfully. All 15 public pages render without errors. Key interactive features: 1) Pricing toggle switches between monthly (£19/£39/£79) and annual (£15/£31/£63) prices, 2) Free Tools has 4 calculators with tab switching, 3) Comparison pages use single component with slug routing for jungle-scout, sell-the-trend, minea. Navigation has Product and Solutions dropdowns. Footer has 5 columns. Mobile menu works correctly. Homepage fetches trending products from /api/public/trending-products.

interactive_elements.pricing_toggle: Monthly/Annual toggle updates all prices correctly
interactive_elements.faq_accordions: Expand/collapse on Pricing and SEO landing pages
interactive_elements.calculator_tabs: 4 tabs switch calculators on Free Tools page
interactive_elements.calculator_inputs: All inputs functional with real-time calculation display
interactive_elements.navigation_dropdowns: Product and Solutions dropdowns show on hover
